item.title: I'm pretty proud of myself.
item.description: Yesterday was a little hard with everyone else indulging in alcohol for the Fourth. But I did it! I'm tired of blacking out all the time. https://imgur.com/gallery/JOTYBtT
item.dc:creator: Zinfandella

item.title: I know most of the fireworks have stopped for now, but at all celebrations can people think of others, they don't need to last hours! There's lots of reasons people are terrified/can't cope...

item.title: Mark Twain hated the Fourth of July
item.description:
Link to original thread: https://x.com/MEASeybold/status/1808884244699140194
Hopefully, these are things the most often quoted man on the internet actually said. Feels right, though.
Not a, 'Twain is great and infallible' post, just some thoughts I thought were interesting.
item.dc:creator: imjustheretoholdyourhandwhenyoudie

item.title: And my axe!
item.dc:creator: thequicksilver

item.title: After two years in bed with long COVID, Youtuber Physics Girl Dianna decided to shave off her hair
item.description:
Dianna decided to shave her head to make it easier on herself for her journey with long COVID and ME/CFS. Many people struggling with this disease choose to do this if bed-bound for extended periods of time, like Dianna has been. Hopefully she can avoid crashes, and reduce the amount of energy it takes to wash and maintain her hair every week. Millions of people are suffering from this quiet and deadly disease. https://www.youtube.com/shorts/rUEc-XehwNQ
In US, almost 18 million adult have had Long COVID. https://www.sciencealert.com/almost-18-million-adult-americans-have-had-long-covid FP edit: They are going to livestream one day of her life tomorrow (Sat 6th Jul) https://www.youtube.com/shorts/gZfg-KUPtMc
item.dc:creator: GlobalImageServiceCat

item.title: Fast Food Friday - Wendy!
item.description:
This Friday, I felt like sharing our facorite smug fast food icon, Wendy! Artist is Cryosleep, Source: https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/96609707
Artist is Nisetanaka, Source (CAUTION): https://x.com/Nisetanaka_tkyo/status/1012639029550956544
Artist is Omar Dugan, Source: https://x.com/OmarDogan1976/status/1803441014629191887
When you crave something new... Artist is Sin, Source: https://x.com/SinTryBest/status/1715746801591238934
Artist is Dylan, Source: https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/62658857 - - - - - I know I could have saved her for RHM, but I felt like sharing her today. Who's a mascot you enjoy??

item.title: Wanna cosplay the US Auto industry?
item.description: The game: https://store.steampowered.com/app/3031880/Car_Park_Capital/ The article: https://www.pcgamer.com/games/city-builder/in-this-satirical-city-builder-your-goal-is-to-convert-walkable-cities-into-parking-lots-and-use-propaganda-to-convince-everyone-its-what-they-want/
item.dc:creator: RacecarRoadcar

item.title: Time for yet another unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
kinda want that now
he cloned himself 4 times and formed a human tower! impressive
quite jealous
we've all been there
mmm hmm
i like it
this is all i'm going to think about now
finally
there really is no other way to describe it
i think he's forgetting about 80s-90s action movies
pegin fit in hands
only in dreams
it's called fashion Brenda
what if we kissed at the end
i kept looking in the corners, took a little while
those patrons have it made
that's my time.. have a great weekend gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: "Thinking about how my grandfather used to sit behind me while I video-chatted with my girlfriend and he didn't understand 'video calls' and told me that watching the same show all day would rot my brain."

item.title: Boss Stage
item.description: For those wondering: this is an actual stage from the 1999 Bregenz Festival in Austria and was used for an opera titled "A Masked Ball".
